title: EXCLUSIVE: Cecilia Malmström shortlisted for top job at the College of Europe
summary_full: Cecilia Malmström, the former Swedish European commissioner, is on a shortlist of candidates to replace Federica Mogherini, who had to leave the College of Europe following a fraud probe and her resignation as rector. Malmström was Commissioner between 2010 and 2019, first with a home affairs portfolio then with trade. Before that, she served as […]
